query: SK Hynix ADR Nasdaq listing SKHY first trading date July 2026 latest news, pricing date, roadshow status, SEC review as of late June 2026. Is July 10 still the expected trading date? Any reports of delay or schedule slippage?
answer:
## Summary

The research question was framed prospectively, but the event has already occurred — and it happened **exactly on schedule with no delay**.

**Key findings:**
- **July 10, 2026 held as the trading date.** SK Hynix ADRs began trading on the Nasdaq Global Select Market on Friday, July 10, 2026, on a "when-issued" basis under temporary ticker **SKHYV**, switching to **SKHY** (regular-way) on July 13, 2026.
- **Pricing date: July 9, 2026** — priced at **$149.00/ADR** (top of range, ~3.1% above the Seoul close), more than **7x oversubscribed**.
- **First day: closed at $168.01, up ~13%** (opened ~$170.43).
- **~$26.5 billion raised** via 177.9M ADRs (10 ADRs = 1 common share) — the largest US listing by a foreign company ever, second-largest US IPO of 2026 behind SpaceX.
- **SEC review/roadshow:** Proceeded cleanly via Form F-1/F-1/A (EDGAR CIK 2120882). **No reports of delay, slippage, SEC holdup, or roadshow disruption** from any source.

The only nuance versus the plain "July 10 / SKHY" expectation: the ticker was **SKHYV** for the first three trading days before becoming **SKHY** on July 13.

sources.snippet: SK Hynix rose 13% in its first day of trading on Nasdaq, closing at $168.01... trading under ticker SKHYV, will switch to SKHY as of Tuesday.

sources.title: South Korea's biggest chipmaker SK Hynix plans to raise $29 billion via Nasdaq listing as soon as July 10
sources.snippet: SK Hynix said it expects to start trading on July 10, but added that the dates were tentative and subject to change.

sources.title: Data Technical News #2026-11 REMINDER: SK hynix Inc. IPO on Nasdaq Global Select Market
sources.snippet: SK hynix has listed and began trading on July 10, 2026 on a when-issued basis with symbol SKHYV. The symbol will change to SKHY and begin trading regular way effective July 13, 2026.

sources.title: SK Hynix Nasdaq debut: $26.5 billion ADR listing sets record
sources.snippet: Priced at $149 apiece on Thursday, the offering comprised 177.9 million ADRs, with every ten ADRs corresponding to a single underlying common share.

sources.title: SK Hynix Raises $26.5 Billion in Biggest Foreign Debut in US
sources.snippet: SK Hynix priced its US share offering at $149 apiece.

sources.title: SK Hynix eyes blockbuster US debut with $149 ADR target, Bloomberg reports
sources.snippet: Priced at $149 per ADR, ~3.1% premium over Thursday's Seoul close of 218,600 won.

sources.title: SK Hynix raises $26.5 billion in US offering after pricing ADRs at $149 (Reuters)
sources.snippet: SK Hynix US listing more than seven times oversubscribed, source says.
